overview.name: GraphQL Body Raw
overview.description:
This scenario verifies GraphQL request execution using raw body.
Test flow includes: 1. Send GraphQL mutation using raw request body. 2. Verify response status = 200. 3. Validate returned GraphQL response. 4. Reset in-memory GraphQL storage after test.
This scenario validates: - GraphQL request execution using raw body - Correct request body parsing - Response body correctness

graphql.comment: Step 1-3. Execute GraphQL mutation using raw request body
Step 4. Reset GraphQL storage after raw body test
